text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
U-um, Fuji? I was hoping I could get your advice
on my dancing...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I would be glad to help you, my darling pony! I'll
make sure you don't regret asking me for help.
That's a promise.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: O-oh! Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I always mess up in the same spot when it's time
for the real deal... I don't know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Then just listen closely to my voice so you can
stay on track. You can do that, can't you, lovely
pony?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
O-oh my gosh! Yes! I could listen to your voice all
day long!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is the epitome of reliability. She's
always calm and collected, and many students
look up to her. As a trainer, I should try to be
more like her.
choice_data_list: Time to train now, dearest ponies...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that out loud is so much more
embarrassing than I thought it would be... I can't
possibly do it. I'd probably scare everyone away
instead.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm, were you pretending to be me just now?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Just now. But what a wonderful surprise!
That was a very good impression of me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've just had a great idea! Since we have
tomorrow off, why don't we spend it together?
There's a game I want to play with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, I hurry to our meeting spot,
intending to arrive first, but Fuji Kiseki is already
waiting for me by the time I get there.
choice_data_list: S-sorry for making you wait, sweet pony.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. I wasn't here long. Are you all right? I
suppose you couldn't help but sprint over as soon
as you caught sight of my visage. It's okay, take
your time to catch your breath.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "game" she wants to play with me is for us to
imitate each other all day long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says focusing on reactions and attitude,
rather than tone, will give us a chance to
understand each other better.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go. Tell me if you get tired, okay?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible! You got an even higher score
than before! I wish I could see you do that again!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I won't even blink, so just relax and do your best!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've sung quite a bit. Are you thirsty? Should
we order some drinks?
choice_data_list:
Y-your voice is as beautiful as a canary's... It'd
be lovely, er...

Y-your voice is as beautiful as a canary's... It'd
be lovely, er...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You mean you'd like to hear more? Sure! But let's
take it easy for now. We still have a lot of time.
There's no rush.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've kept at the game for the entire day, but
for some reason, Fuji Kiseki's interpretation of me
seems so...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you tired? We did walk a lot today. Shall we
call it here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her version of me seems like a thoughtful,
well-put-together adult who knows all their
partner's good points and praises them
accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. So, what did you think of today's game?
Did you enjoy it?
choice_data_list: Yeah, it was a lot of fun.
I think we could've done better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if I did a good job imitating her, but
spending all day thinking about how she usually
acts or responds to things was interesting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It makes me feel like I've gained a deeper
understanding of her, and I tell her so.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you were thinking about me all day long,
were you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That makes me happy. I'm glad we were
able to have such a good time together. And
now, I must ask...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you finally understand the way I see you,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's question catches me so off guard that
I can do no more than stare at her while she gives
me a wicked smile.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you might have a point. The version of you in
my mind is much more wonderful than the way I
portrayed you today!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. As for the way you see me... Let's just say I
don't hate it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to get to know each other even more so
we can imitate each other better next time...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What do you think we should do to make that
happen, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki pins me down with an amused smile,
and I really have no idea how I should answer her.
